kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=mysession, url=https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: DELETE On Session
kw.msg: DELETE Request : url=https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/posts/1 path_url=/posts/1 headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.33.1', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Type': 'Application/Json', 'Content-Length': '0'} body=None
kw.doc: Sends a DELETE request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: {'id': 1, 'name': 'Leanne Graham', 'username': 'Bret', 'email': 'Sincere@april.biz', 'address': {'street': 'Kulas Light', 'suite': 'Apt. 556', 'city': 'Gwenborough', 'zipcode': '92998-3874', 'geo': {'lat': '-37.3159', 'lng': '81.1496'}}, 'phone': '1-770-736-8031 x56442', 'website': 'hildegard.org', 'company': {'name': 'Romaguera-Crona', 'catchPhrase': 'Multi-layered client-server neural-net', 'bs': 'harness real-time e-markets'}}
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: PATCH On Session
kw.msg: PATCH Request : url=https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/posts/1 path_url=/posts/1 headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.33.1', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Content-Length': '67'} body=b'{"name": "chetan", "age": "33", "city": "Bangalore", "userId": "1"}'

PATCH Response : url=https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/posts/1 status=200, reason=OK headers={'Date': 'Sat, 25 Apr 2026 13:07:45 GMT', 'Content-Type': 'application/json; charset=utf-8', 'Transfer-Encoding': 'chunked', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'access-control-allow-credentials': 'true', 'Cache-Control': 'no-cache', 'etag': 'W/"160-3E/EdmLMZQjetZGsf1lzQM4CP1I"', 'expires': '-1', 'nel': '{"report_to":"heroku-nel","response_headers":["Via"],"max_age":3600,"success_fraction":0.01,"failure_fraction":0.1}', 'pragma': 'no-cache', 'report-to': '{"group":"heroku-nel","endpoints":[{"url":"https://nel.heroku.com/reports?s=Dl%2BynBUGRnLn%2BbMK8D2WLqBUHGKdsZVCdHxRe5E%2BfH8%3D\u0026sid=e11707d5-02a7-43ef-b45e-2cf4d2036f7d\u0026ts=1777122465"}],"max_age":3600}', 'reporting-endpoints': 'heroku-nel="https://nel.heroku.com/reports?s=Dl%2BynBUGRnLn%2BbMK8D2WLqBUHGKdsZVCdHxRe5E%2BfH8%3D&sid=e11707d5-02a7-43ef-b45e-2cf4d2036f7d&ts=1777122465"', 'Server': 'cloudflare', 'vary': 'Origin, Accept-Encoding', 'via': '2.0 heroku-router', 'x-content-type-options': 'nosniff', 'x-powered-by': 'Express', 'x-ratelimit-limit': '1000', 'x-ratelimit-remaining': '999', 'x-ratelimit-reset': '1777122525', 'cf-cache-status': 'DYNAMIC', 'Content-Encoding': 'gzip', 'CF-RAY': '9f1d928f4f1e6510-MRS', 'alt-svc': 'h3=":443"; ma=86400'} body={ "userId": "1", "id": 1, "title": "sunt aut facere repellat provident occaecati excepturi optio reprehenderit", "body": "quia et suscipit
suscipit recusandae consequuntur expedita et cum
reprehenderit molestiae ut ut quas totam
nostrum rerum est autem sunt rem eveniet architecto", "name": "chetan", "age": "33", "city": "Bangalore" }
kw.doc: Sends a PATCH request on a previously created HTTP Session.
